username.label: AniDB Username
username.description: Your AniDB username (NOT the API password — see docs)

api_key.label: AniDB API Password
api_key.description: The API password from your AniDB profile (NOT your login password)

use_title_dump.label: Use AniDB Title Dump
use_title_dump.description: Download the daily anime titles dump for fast offline search. Recommended — reduces API calls.

title_dump_url.label: Title Dump URL
title_dump_url.description: URL to the anime-titles.dat.gz file. Change only if using a mirror.
